6:["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]
7:["$","code",null,{"children":"Memory"}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"The Problem"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent context windows are limited (4K–128K tokens). Raw memory dumps consume precious space. AAAK applies deterministic text substitutions to compress related memories into shorter representations."}]
a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"How AAAK Works"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"encode()"}]," function performs text substitution in three passes:"]}]
c:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Category prefixes"}],": Replaces verbose category labels with short tokens (e.g., ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"conversation:\""}]," → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"conv:\""}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Phrase compression"}],": Substitutes common phrases with abbreviated forms"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Structural"}],": Normalizes whitespace, removes redundant formatting"]}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Compression Ratios"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["AAAK achieves approximately ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"30–50%"}]," text reduction:"]}]
f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Content Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Original"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Compressed"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Reduction"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1,000 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~600 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~40%"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Documentation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"800 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~500 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~38%"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Mixed content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1,200 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~700 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~42%"}]]}]]}]]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":["Actual ratios vary by content. AAAK is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"lossy"}]," — some detail is sacrificed for brevity."]}]
11:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Using AAAK"}]
12:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.aaak import encode\n\n# Encode (compress) text\ncompressed = encode(original_text)\n\n# The result is a shorter string, not a separate object\nprint(f\"Original: {len(original_text)} chars\")\nprint(f\"Compressed: {len(compressed)} chars\")\n","language":"python"}]
13:["$","h3",null,{"children":"During Consolidation"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"AAAK is applied automatically during sleep consolidation when summarizing groups of Working Memory entries:"}]
15:["$","$L20",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  WM[Working Memory Entries] -->|group by source| G[Grouped]\n  G -->|encode via AAAK| C[Compressed Summary]\n  C -->|promote| EM[Episodic Memory]\n"}]
16:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Important Notes"}]
17:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"encode()"}]," is one-way"]}],": There is no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"decode()"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"expand()"}]," function. Once compressed, the original text is not recoverable from the output alone."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Not a Memory method"}],": AAAK is a standalone module, not called via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.compress()"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.expand()"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Used during consolidation"}],": Applied by the sleep consolidation pipeline to compress summaries before promoting to Episodic Memory."]}],"\n"]}]
18:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L21",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Lossy Compression"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"AAAK is lossy — fine details may be lost during compression. Critical facts should be stored in Semantic Memory (which is not compressed) or marked with high importance to preserve detail."}]}]]}]]}]}]

29:[["$","title","0",{"children":"AAAK Compression — Text Substitution for Memory Compaction"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Understand AAAK compression in Mnemosyne: a text substitution system that reduces memory content size by applying category prefixes, phrase compression, and structural patterns."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"author","href":"https://github.com/axdsan"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"author","content":"Abdias Moya"}],["$","meta","4",{"name":"keywords","content":"AI memory,agent memory,persistent memory,BEAM,Mnemosyne,SQLite,vector search,Hermes plugin"}],["$","meta","5",{"name":"robots","content":"index, follow"}],["$","link","6",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:title","content":"AAAK Compression — Text Substitution for Memory Compaction"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:description","content":"Understand AAAK compression in Mnemosyne: a text substitution system that reduces memory content size by applying category prefixes, phrase compression, and structural patterns."}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","meta","10",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","11",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"AAAK Compression — Text Substitution for Memory Compaction"}],["$","meta","12",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Understand AAAK compression in Mnemosyne: a text substitution system that reduces memory content size by applying category prefixes, phrase compression, and structural patterns."}],["$","meta","13",{"name":"twitter:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","link","14",{"rel":"icon","href":"/favicon.ico?favicon.0x3dzn~oxb6tn.ico","sizes":"256x256","type":"image/x-icon"}],["$","$L2b","15",{}]]
